title: LOW: SSE streaming has no subscription limit
description: In src/streaming.rs, the WebSocket handler caps subscriptions at 10 per connection (line 214), but the SSE handler (streaming_sse_handler, lines 126-149) has no such limit. A client can open unbounded SSE connections, each subscribing to a different channel. While connection-level rate limiting is delegated to the reverse proxy per docs/deployment.md, within that limit a single client could open many SSE connections. Consider documenting the expected reverse proxy config for SSE connection limits, or adding a per-account subscription cap at the application layer.
close_reason: Non-issue: SSE endpoint uses single channel from URL path, not multiple subscriptions. Only WebSocket supports subscribe/unsubscribe commands.
